name: Terra Orb
why: One of the best Epic relics in the game. Its reliable damage and universal usefulness make it an excellent long-term investment for every faction, especially for free-to-play players.
description: Calls down Rockfall Strike, dealing heavy area damage while disrupting enemy formations. Terra Orb remains one of the strongest Epic relics and is widely recommended until it can eventually be replaced by top-tier Legendary relics.
